---
title: "Team"
toc: false
listing:
  id: team-listing
  contents: team
  sort: "order"
  type: default
  image-align: left
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, description]
  categories: true
---

DIGIPOLS brings together social scientists and computer scientists from the Cyprus University of Technology. The lab is coordinated by the Board of Directors and includes a growing group of research associates.

::: {#team-listing}
:::
